args.Description: "Remove overflow-hidden from newsletter section editor wrapper."
args.Instruction: "Replace the wrapper div class to remove overflow-hidden."
args.ReplacementContent: "                                                    <div className=\"bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 focus-within:border-indigo-500 transition-all\">"
args.TargetContent: "                                                    <div className=\"bg-white rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-slate-200 focus-within:border-indigo-500 transition-all\">"
